scripts.build:web:half: node build-cult-connector-sync-lottie.mjs && node halve-lottie-rasters.mjs cult-connector-sync.json cult-connector-sync-half.json && node sync-inline-web-lottie.mjs --half
scripts.build:web:external: node build-cult-connector-sync-lottie.mjs && node halve-lottie-rasters.mjs cult-connector-sync.json cult-connector-sync-half.json && node externalize-lottie-assets.mjs cult-connector-sync-half.json cult-connector-sync-web
